// ===== Steps Accordion Functionality =====
(function() {
    const stepsData = [
        {
            video: 'https://user-components-assets.s3.eu-south-1.amazonaws.com/myop2/1766071626150-Step 3 -Save and test in Myop - screenshot v2.mp4',
            tags: ['AI-Powered', 'Live Editor', 'Instant Preview']
        },
        {
            video: 'https://user-components-assets.s3.eu-south-1.amazonaws.com/myop2/1766071626150-Step 4-connect.mp4',
            tags: ['Sandboxed', 'Secure', 'Framework-Agnostic']
        },
        {
            video: 'https://user-components-assets.s3.eu-south-1.amazonaws.com/myop2/1766071626150-Rollout Board (1).mp4',
            tags: ['One-Click', 'Live Updates', 'Monitoring']
        },
        {
            video: 'https://user-components-assets.s3.eu-south-1.amazonaws.com/myop2/1766776473258-Keren Fanan_s Video - Dec 17, 2025 (4).mp4',
            tags: ['Analytics', 'A/B Testing', 'Performance']
        }
    ];

    const stepItems = document.querySelectorAll('.step-item');
    const stepsVideo = document.getElementById('stepsVideo');
    const stepsTags = document.getElementById('stepsTags');

    if (!stepItems.length || !stepsVideo || !stepsTags) return;

    // Preload all videos for instant switching
    const preloadedVideos = [];
    stepsData.forEach((step, index) => {
        const video = document.createElement('video');
        video.src = step.video;
        video.preload = 'auto';
        video.muted = true;
        video.loop = true;
        video.playsInline = true;
        video.style.display = 'none';
        document.body.appendChild(video);
        preloadedVideos[index] = video;
    });

    let currentIndex = 0;
    let autoLoopInterval = null;
    let autoLoopStopped = false;

    function updateStep(index, skipIfSame = true) {
        if (skipIfSame && index === currentIndex) return;

        // Update active state and toggle symbols
        stepItems.forEach((item, i) => {
            item.classList.toggle('active', i === index);
            const toggle = item.querySelector('.step-toggle');
            if (toggle) {
                toggle.textContent = i === index ? '-' : '+';
            }
        });

        // Fade out video smoothly
        stepsVideo.classList.add('fade-out');

        setTimeout(() => {
            // Use preloaded video source
            const videoSource = stepsVideo.querySelector('source');
            videoSource.src = stepsData[index].video;
            stepsVideo.load();

            // Since video is preloaded, it should be ready quickly
            stepsVideo.oncanplay = function() {
                stepsVideo.play();
                requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                    stepsVideo.classList.remove('fade-out');
                });
                stepsVideo.oncanplay = null;
            };

            // Fallback: show video after short delay even if oncanplay doesn't fire
            setTimeout(() => {
                if (stepsVideo.classList.contains('fade-out')) {
                    stepsVideo.play();
                    stepsVideo.classList.remove('fade-out');
                }
            }, 300);

            // Update tags with fade effect
            stepsTags.style.opacity = '0';
            setTimeout(() => {
                stepsTags.innerHTML = stepsData[index].tags.map(tag =>
                    `<span class="tag">${tag}</span>`
                ).join('');
                stepsTags.style.opacity = '1';
            }, 150);

            currentIndex = index;
        }, 300);
    }

    // Auto-loop function
    function startAutoLoop() {
        if (autoLoopStopped) return;
        autoLoopInterval = setInterval(() => {
            const nextIndex = (currentIndex + 1) % stepsData.length;
            updateStep(nextIndex, false);
        }, 10000);
    }

    function stopAutoLoop() {
        autoLoopStopped = true;
        if (autoLoopInterval) {
            clearInterval(autoLoopInterval);
            autoLoopInterval = null;
        }
    }

    // Start auto-loop on page load
    startAutoLoop();

    stepItems.forEach((item, index) => {
        item.addEventListener('click', () => {
            stopAutoLoop();
            updateStep(index);
        });
        item.addEventListener('touchstart', () => {
            stopAutoLoop();
        }, { passive: true });
    });
})();

// Mobile steps toggle functionality
(function() {
    const mobileStepItems = document.querySelectorAll('.step-mobile-item');

    function updateToggleSymbol(item) {
        const toggle = item.querySelector('.step-mobile-toggle');
        if (toggle) {
            toggle.textContent = item.classList.contains('expanded') ? '−' : '+';
        }
    }

    // Start with first item (Build) open
    if (mobileStepItems.length > 0) {
        mobileStepItems[0].classList.add('expanded');
        updateToggleSymbol(mobileStepItems[0]);
    }

    mobileStepItems.forEach(item => {
        const heading = item.querySelector('h3');
        if (heading) {
            heading.addEventListener('click', () => {
                // Close all other items and update their symbols
                mobileStepItems.forEach(otherItem => {
                    if (otherItem !== item) {
                        otherItem.classList.remove('expanded');
                        updateToggleSymbol(otherItem);
                    }
                });
                // Toggle current item
                item.classList.toggle('expanded');
                updateToggleSymbol(item);
            });
        }
    });
})();
</script>
